3196690.name: SkyFolk
3196690.description:
🐾 A Cozy Animal Shop

Welcome to a small town where animals aren’t just customers — they’re friends.
In this relaxing, cozy game, you run a little shop for adorable anthropomorphic animals: selling goods, decorating your store, chatting with locals, and slowly making the town a better place.

Every day brings something new.
Someone might stop by looking for a rare item, another may ask for advice, and some will come in just to talk. Each animal has its own personality, habits, and small personal stories.

🌿 Features

  • Cozy, pressure-free gameplay

  • A customizable and upgradable shop

  • Dozens of charming animal characters with unique dialogue

  • A warm atmosphere with day/night cycles and weather

  • A game you’ll love coming back to every day

This is a game about calm, care, and small joys —
about watching a simple shop grow into the heart of the town.
